creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
please note: this could be affected by the pkg_delete problem with links
to directories.

pkg_delete will complain.

If you are interested in a fixed PLIST please drop me a note, it takes a
while to
rebuild everything. Also, it looks like KDE installs more/less files if
it finds 
different packages at compile time. Maybe parts of the PLIST should be
build at
post-install time.

Same for kdebase2.

bye,
  jimmy
